name: Carly Reilly
subject: I'll be frank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Andrew is the only candidate who will be ready on day one to address the biggest problem facing the United States -- automation and the loss of jobs. But to get this message out in front of voters in Iowa and New Hampshire we have to close the fundraising gap we’re facing.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok) Friend --

First, I want to thank you for being a supporter and a part of the Yang Gang. Your support means the world to us!

I’m Carly, Andrew’s finance director, and it’s my job to make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to compete for the nomination and win in 2020. **And I’ll be frank -- right now, we’re falling short of the big numbers other campaigns have raised to date.**

Andrew is the only candidate who will be ready on day one to address the biggest problem facing the United States -- automation and the loss of jobs. But to get this message out in front of voters in Iowa and New Hampshire we have to close the fundraising gap we’re facing.

[Friend, if you want Andrew as our next president then now is the time to step up. We need to raise $250,000 TODAY in order to stay on track for our FEC goal, and we need every single member of the Yang Gang to make a donation.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=5&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=13&amount=5&express_lane=true&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)
---
| | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=12&amount=10&express_lane=true&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)

| [$15 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=11&amount=15&express_lane=true&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)

---
| [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=9&amount=25&express_lane=true&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=8&amount=25&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)
---
Here’s some math for you:
* **400,000** people will receive this email
* **25%** who receive this email will open it
* **2%** of the people who open the email will make a donation

If we can get **5%** of you to donate, we will get back on track for our fundraising goal. If enough people like you decide to donate for the first time today, we can change this race in a real way.

As president, Andrew will expand Medicare to ensure that all Americans have access to the healthcare they deserve, address climate change as the existential crisis that it is, and enact policies to put humanity first.

[Become a donating member of the Yang Gang today!](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=7&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)

Thank you,
Carly Reilly

Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.
[DONATE NOW](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11148?t=6&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=766%2E377263%2ExY59ok) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The swamp is beyond parody, but the American people aren’t laughing
body:
There are a handful of real, pressing concerns on the minds of American families today. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9499d1d25&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 26, 2019
---
| | |
# **The swamp is beyond parody, but the American people aren’t laughing**

**There are a handful** of real, pressing concerns on the minds of American families today.

**They want pro-worker** trade deals such as USMCA. Affordable prescription drug prices. Strong border security. Real gun safety. Even a bit of progress on any one of these issues would bring a huge sigh of relief from citizens that Washington is finally putting them first.

**While this checklist **is only a start, all of these items have something important in common: Congress could have taken meaningful action on any one of them _this week_.

**Instead,** **Congressional Democrats** chose to dedicate their time to yet another political circus hearing, this time about a “whistleblower” report. This latest conspiracy theory alleges that the Trump Administration tried to cover up a transcript of a phone call between President Trump and President Zelensky of Ukraine.

**The White House **has made the call available for all to see, but that’s not even the best part. It turns out the “whistleblower” had no first-hand knowledge of anything being alleged.

**You can’t** make this stuff up.

**Of course, the political theater** took over Washington once again with wall-to-wall coverage from the left’s usual media allies. It was yet another week completely wasted for Congress, who has real work to do keeping its promises to American voters. But like cats chasing a laser pointer, Democrats and their surrogates are jumping at anything that moves if it means they can avoid actually having to get anything done for a little bit longer.

**The scariest part?** This might only be the beginning. With House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s caucus increasingly dominated by a radical left wing that demands open borders, socialized medicine, and a complete government takeover of the economy under euphemisms like the “Green New Deal,” political theater for the adoring liberal press may be the only thing holding the left together. Democrat leaders have no power against the rising Democratic Socialist stars in their party, so they have no choice but to give in to their childish antics.

**So while Democrats in Congress** have thrown nearly 3 years down the drain as a result, President Trump is keeping his focus on what matters to working Americans, White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham said today:
| _“Nothing has changed with the release of this complaint, which is nothing more than a collection of third-hand accounts of events and cobbled-together press clippings—all of which shows nothing improper. The President took the extraordinary and transparent steps of releasing the full, unredacted, and declassified transcript of his call with President Zelensky, which forms the heart of the complaint, as well as the complaint itself. That is because he has nothing to hide. The White House will continue to push back on the hysteria and false narratives being peddled by Democrats and many in the mainstream media, and President Trump will continue to work hard on behalf of the American people as he always does.”_ |
---|---

[Gallup: Americans' trust in the media is falling – down to 36% for Independents ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8de1058ab&e=3ee4985eea)

**Par for the course:** [Schiff opens hearing by ‘making up quotes’ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=836c95881c&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **What working hard for America looks like**

**This week,** President Trump was in New York for the U.N. General Assembly, where he wasted no time delivering results for American citizens while meeting with world leaders.

**Each day** had a different focus, but in every single one, the President put the interests of the American people above all else:

* On the main stage, President Trump told America’s story, saying that [“the future does not belong to globalists.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=696211813d&e=3ee4985eea)

* He secured a historic trade deal with Japan, ensuring that [American farmers are the main winners](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12dba1392f&e=3ee4985eea).

* He promoted the [protection of religious liberty](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cdeed3656&e=3ee4985eea)—a first for an American President at the United Nations.

* He called on world leaders to stand against Venezuela’s murderous Maduro regime, declaring that America is behind both [“the Venezuelan people”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c672dbe12&e=3ee4985eea) and stopping socialism in this hemisphere.

[With the U.S.–Japan deal, “Nebraska farmers can finally catch a break.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b7b49ba1c&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬**Watch:** [First Lady Melania Trump rings the opening bell at the New York Stock Exchange](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0752cf7594&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump’s motorcade drives to the Wall Street Landing Zone in New York for his return to Washington, D.C.** | September 26, 2019
---
|

---

---

The 2020 Democrats are floundering. **They heard we had a RECORD BREAKING AUGUST, and they're quickly realizing that NONE of them stand a chance of winning in 2020.**

But, the **BIG GOVERNMENT SOCIALISTS** like _Sleepy Joe, Crazy Bernie, and Pocahontas_ won't go down without a fight. They're firing up their base of **MEGA HOLLYWOOD DONORS** to rescue their campaigns, _which is why I really need you to step up, Friend._

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10324340/103621618/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDg1ZjdkYi0zMGUxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWElCN44quFbRImhIRocesNFEnR5hb7efYXcly_zdPQ=&emci=e520886a-30e1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=a485f7db-30e1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **As Trump sells our democracy, McCaul defends him.** You’ve seen the news. Trump told Ukraine to investigate Joe Biden. And withheld foreign aid to get his point across. A gross abuse of power. An impeachable offense. What you may not have seen is Rep. McCaul in the Wall Street Journal, rising to Trump’s defense. Saying impeachment is “what Putin wants.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10324341/103621642/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDg1ZjdkYi0zMGUxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWElCN44quFbRImhIRocesNFEnR5hb7efYXcly_zdPQ=&refcode=em092619&recurring=1)
McCaul’s contorted logic is true to form. Never mind that a U.S. intelligence official, supported by multiple witnesses, says Trump methodically prepared for his Ukraine shakedown. Never mind that Trump’s team hid the phone call transcript on an ultra-secure computer server. Never mind that Trump used national resources for his personal gain. When our democracy is on the line, McCaul chose a side: to protect a corrupt dictator. To defend a President who today threatened to execute a whistleblower. To coddle a person who is undermining American democracy, at home and abroad. We can’t tolerate Trump appeasers for a minute longer. My campaign has built the foundation for political change in the Texas 10th. With the support of unions, environmentalists, human rights advocates, Democratic activists, and countless caring individuals, we are assembling a people’s movement. Our mission is to replace the corrupt regime in power and restore common sense and decency to our government. [**We need your support today. The value of a functioning democracy is beyond price, but every dollar you give today will make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10324344/103621664/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDg1ZjdkYi0zMGUxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWElCN44quFbRImhIRocesNFEnR5hb7efYXcly_zdPQ=&refcode=em092619&recurring=1) For the future of our district and our nation, join us. I’m here, fighting for you.
Mike Siegel

After the September 30 FEC deadline, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become available to the public.

Reporters, pundits, and the Republican operatives will use these numbers to judge the strength of this campaign.

**This public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our movement's strength. That's why we have a plan to make sure we have the strongest fundraising report possible.

**If climate change denying Republicans keep this up, an estimated 143 million people could be displaced from their homes as a DIRECT RESULT of climate change by 2050!**
[**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. If you believe in science and want to act on climate NOW, rush in a donation to 314 Action to help them protect Democratic Scientists supporting Greta ->**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_climateaction?refcode=314_EM_FR_190927_GretaUN_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+ENOUGH+IS+ENOUGH+If+you+believe+in+scien&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190927_GretaUN_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190927_GretaUN_U1_X1")

---
As Greta has said, they are attacking her because they can't attack the science.
But as the largest grassroots organization dedicated to electing scientists, we won't stand by while Fox News hacks try to silence a teen climate activist with name-calling and smears.
[**We need 2,500 members to stand in solidarity with Greta before midnight: Make a donation to our Congressional Challenger Fund so we can elect Democratic scientists who will finally act on climate!**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_climateaction?refcode=314_EM_FR_190927_GretaUN_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12+-+We+need+2500+members+to+stand+in+solidar&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190927_GretaUN_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190927_GretaUN_U1_X1")

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. name: Greg Stanton
subject: we shocked the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**Exactly one month ago, we shocked the entire country here in Phoenix when we flocked to the polls to reject the Koch Network and other dark money groups by voting to protect public transit, libraries, parks, and senior services!**

Last month's victories for the No on 105 and No on 106 efforts showed us the roadmap that we have to follow in 2020, which is to show voters that we are on _their_ side.

[**Help me get my message out to voters in 2020 that I am fighting for _all of us_ -- ****DONATE NOW >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/InHguza0KA-dVvx1OyMedVIXxl0JnHxMIPsXv6IG7Us=/YXWix9kejV4qvsghWr_Rs8hd8bmJ1rE99MKWd9YFllc=?refcode=X_092719_EOQ_F&amount=25&recurring=auto)

**In Congress, I am working to protect our environment, build out our infrastructure, invest in our schools, support our diverse communities, and empower our economic growth. **

I want to make sure voters hear this message in my 2020 re-election campaign, which is why I am counting on your support to make sure I have enough campaign funding to fight back against Big Money lies.

[**Will you chip in to my re-election campaign today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/InHguza0KA-dVvx1OyMedVIXxl0JnHxMIPsXv6IG7Us=/YXWix9kejV4qvsghWr_Rs8hd8bmJ1rE99MKWd9YFllc=?refcode=X_092719_EOQ_F&amount=25&recurring=auto)

name: Ed Markey
subject: Three days to show we have what it takes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Since Joe Kennedy III announced his primary challenge, supporters have shown that our movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality is unstoppable.

We're on the front lines of the fights that define our times, and with your help, we'll win in Massachusetts, take back the White House and the Senate, and put our country back on the right track.

_**[Will you help us reach our $75,000 FEC deadline goal by pitching in $27 or more? Right now we're 91% of the way there, and we need all hands on deck to help.](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092719_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

I'm proud of the broad, diverse, and growing endorsements we've received.

> ➜ Elizabeth Warren
> ➜ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
> ➜ AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees
> ➜ Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, Coalition for Social Justice, the Sierra Club, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Mass Action, and more
> ➜ And 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature
Every day, I'm taking on Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell to defend our progressive values.

But I can't do that without your help. Reaching our FEC goal will show everyone that we have what it takes to win.

_**[That's why we must reach our $75,000 FEC deadline goal in the next three days. subject: This is ambitious

body:
We've set a goal of raising an additional $125,000 to make sure the FEC report we release next month reflects how strong we know this team is. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d6/691c9bd/6e2c9685/11a7a3ee/2785782472/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")

| Team,

I know you're getting a lot of emails asking for your support, and I'm going to be honest with you right at the top... this is another one.

But the truth is, if your inbox is being bombarded right now it's because you're someone who is involved and engaged--someone who cares about the future of our country. So I don't need to tell you how much is at stake in this election.

**Cory Gardner and his special-interest allies in Washington have dragged our country backward every time they 've had the chance. And they've made it clear they're not going to let this Senate seat slip through their fingers.**

Coloradans deserve better, and we're building a grassroots operation that can win--and do it the right way. So before the first quarterly FEC deadline of this campaign, we've set a goal of raising an additional $125,000 to make sure the FEC report we release next month reflects how strong we know this team is.

**It 's ambitious, but so is this campaign. **[**_Help us reach our goal by chipping in whatever you can, right now:_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190927_SS_20190927-fr-SS-125-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190927_SS_20190927-fr-SS-125-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Prove to them you won’t be intimidated
body:
The tactic used against me by the Left has been to call me a racist, a white supremacist, an "Islamaphobe" and even, sadly a "Nazi."
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660984-0ae1e13f7b-357354d0b7)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660983-59f6655e84-357354d0b7) The tactic used against me by the Left has been to call me a racist, a white supremacist, an "Islamophobe" and even, sadly a "Nazi."

As a Jewish woman, I just shake my head every time I hear that nonsense . . . but I know why they do it.

**They want YOU to be ashamed to be associated with me.**

The rule of the jungle is "eat or be eaten." The rule of politics is "define or be defined."

They believe that if enough people believe their lies and how they define me, I'll have to slink away and never be heard from again.

It's important to show them that we're not afraid and we won't be intimidated. **I won't let them define me with lies**.

That's why I'm asking you to take an important step with me by becoming a donor to my run for Congress.

[**Can you donate $10, $25, $50 or more today?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660983-59f6655e84-357354d0b7)

I need to prove to the liberal media that their tactics to define and alienate me don't work--that you won't be scared away as they point at me and falsely scream "racist".

I also need to prove to Republican Party leadership, that THEY don't have to fall for the same tactic.

A day after I launched my campaign for Congress, a spokesman for the DCCC (the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) said, "This is today's Washington Republican Party, **a full-blown white nationalist is running for Congress in Florida, Republicans must condemn Loomer 's hate-filled message or they own it**."

The Democrats' attempt to define and alienate me couldn't be more blatant than that.

That's why I believe it's so important to have as many Americans as possible supporting my first campaign before I file my first finance report. [**And that starts with you**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660983-59f6655e84-357354d0b7).

If you're able, [**please take the step of donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660983-59f6655e84-357354d0b7)--and prove to them that **we 're not afraid** of their hateful labels and lies.

Thank you so much for all that you've done.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Your name won't appear on my campaign finance report UNLESS you've [**donated a total of $200 or more**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660983-59f6655e84-357354d0b7). But any amount you can donate will help me win this election against an incumbent Democrat. [**Please give whatever you can today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-4660983-59f6655e84-357354d0b7).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-348893-809013-84585d41bbe610b-357354d0b7)

Peter - it seems like every day our nation becomes more divided and many of our leaders are feeding that division.

Each of us can make a big difference though and it's up to us to do what we can to help. That's the theme of my new book, “It’s Up to Us,” to be released on Oct. 15.

**This isn't a book about politics, but rather a remedy for the division and anxiety we see in our lives these days**.

For a limited time, we will be [sending copies of this book as a thank you for a generous donation](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e33f9113580a4109b2a193f93b67e8f0&_e=WHs0MP8j-ZgzvIav6JzYLfypkweM4q5gkrdk73AK_wBoKQupGFCjPAERbixRxpSZMn4ZQZwCPPXunUUxcyGKfIk_nLLbjoB9HXtfYFTigVwDt02dtzYH6vzyhFZuRcK6H3Heca5JBCwMcLLw3KLfe8ZBJg-eItiIyIMBgE63moHGTRnBxole3fOy48MS4iDfp5BI_Ngsl-w8ra3A_IPVsdineCMFa9DG5FXgpuYsiBCqxpbGdfXhOvpJlo0tVkgyrHpS4Wk6wFMf2pNVX-GJLA%3D%3D) to support our ongoing efforts to fight for a return to civility and compassion in America.

clean_body: But each of us can make a big difference and it's up to us to do what we can to help | | Peter - it seems like every day our nation becomes more divided and many of our leaders are feeding that division. Each of us can make a big difference though and it's up to us to do what we can to help. That's the theme of my new book, “It’s Up to Us,” to be released on Oct. 15. This isn't a book about politics, but rather a remedy for the division and anxiety we see in our lives these days. For a limited time, we will be to support our ongoing efforts to fight for a return to civility and compassion in America. | I look forward to sharing this book with you and hearing your feedback. The funds we raise go directly into supporting our programs and staff that make this message possible. Thank you for your consideration. -John | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

name: Bill Weld
subject: I still have hope, do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCIL4J1YgRJ_s8drjZMf8Oec&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190927_1&n=1) I’ll be honest — this was a tough news week. It’s hard not to watch what’s going on with President Trump and his cabal of cronies and not worry about the future of our nation and our party. _But I’m here to remind you that there is still hope._ There is hope that this president will be brought to justice. There is hope that we can reclaim the Republican Party from the grips of this group of grifters. **_There is hope that our politics won’t always be this way._** It is this optimism that I hear every day from voters across the country on the campaign trail, and it is what keeps me going — even in times like these. It is a reminder that Americans understand that we _can_ and _must_ do better. **It is a reminder that we’ve got a real shot at winning this thing.** [**So if you’re like me and still believe there’s hope that we can restore dignity to America and our party, I ask that you consider making a donation to my campaign**. ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCIL4J1YgRJ_s8drjZMf8Oec&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190927_1&n=2) We’ve got a very important end-or-quarter fundraising deadline coming up on Monday, and I’m hoping we can use that as an opportunity to show the American people, and the world, that there is still hope for us to turn our country around. -Bill | | [DONATE ⇒](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCIL4J1YgRJ_s8drjZMf8Oec&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190927_1&n=3)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190927_1&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190927_1&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190927_1&n=7), software for leaders.

subject: I need you to read this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c1a904f128&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
In three short days, David’s fundraising number goes public. So many of our supporters have stepped up, but right now we’re falling short of our quarterly fundraising goal.

[**Can you help us get back on track right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f4f18f7f2d&e=02cd889ad3)

**You may not know this, but David and I actually met in the first grade.** I know his heart and have seen firsthand his concern for our nation’s future. David ran for the U.S. Senate to deliver results and change the direction of our country.

**I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish, but now we’re facing our toughest fight yet.** Radical Democrats see that David has had an impact by working with President Trump and they will do whatever it takes to defeat him in 2020.

[**We need as many of our supporters as possible to give now so that we can fight back.** ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=58dc9802fd&e=02cd889ad3)

We defied the odds and won in 2014 because of supporters like you. President Trump defied the odds in 2016 and won because of supporters like you. I know we can defy the odds and win again, but only if we stick together now.

We know you’re one of our strongest supporters, and we need you to stand with us now more than ever before.

[**Please pitch in now and help us hit our goal for this fundraising quarter.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=92ae3b3b81&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything,
[](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bd498f66e5&e=02cd889ad3)
Bonnie Perdue

subject: Tonight, if you get a call from an unknown number, it might be me

body:
I'm calling grassroots donors every night for the next few days to thank them for chipping in. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529aaa/45c30650/13509889e/668c22b8/2332616653/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm calling grassroots donors every night for the next few days to thank them for chipping in.

It started last night, and I'm feeling even more inspired after talking with Zachary from Ohio. He works at a Circle K and chipped in $3 yesterday because he's in this fight to make big, structural change. (And as a lovely bonus, I also got to say hi to his boyfriend, Alex!)

**[I'd love to talk with you, too, about what gets you in the fight. Chip in $3 or whatever you can, and I might call to say thanks later tonight!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529aaa/45c30650/13509889e/668c22ba/2332616653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUNGX0VPUV9ET0NfRV8yMDE5MDkyN19WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1CF_EOQ_DOC_E_20190927_V1S2_P_T2")**

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529aaa/45c30650/13509889e/668c22ba/2332616653/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUNGX0VPUV9ET0NfRV8yMDE5MDkyN19WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1CF_EOQ_DOC_E_20190927_V1S2_P_T2")

>
Zachary told me over the phone that he's living paycheck to paycheck right now, but he chipped in because he said this campaign is something to believe in. And then we promised that we were going to be in this fight together.

Talking to people like Zachary is why call time is my favorite part of the day.

I'm looking forward to chatting with more members of this movement in the next few days. Each and every one of them helps power this grassroots movement. Will you be one of them?

**[Be sure to chip in if you want to talk with me about the big, structural change we're making together. Every donation between now and our Monday deadline will make a real difference.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529aaa/45c30650/13509889e/668c22ba/2332616653/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUNGX0VPUV9ET0NfRV8yMDE5MDkyN19WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1CF_EOQ_DOC_E_20190927_V1S2_P_T2")**

Hope to talk soon!

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

If you get a call from an unknown number, it might just be me!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529aaa/45c30650/13509889e/668c22ba/2332616653/VEsFBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUNGX0VPUV9ET0NfRV8yMDE5MDkyN19WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1CF_EOQ_DOC_E_20190927_V1S2_P_T2")**

name: Tate Reeves
subject: Hiding from voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor | | [](http://mail
body:
We have no choice but to win this race in November [ ](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=17f4f6b861064a0f92f9f41c15a4f3ae&_e=Goxw9KIVU4pZiiBRJSttl5ZH822BmGxJBJcZSI1STDUCBEN8Y5z9f-EqmnuvFZNium3OBuFBAataLTkmMxmWqBjNUJQduXyzQCdmrYEIsacVekifwuKBECcyEgKT_ZWm7W1f0FwAFwqaJjoTEuEdH-9DJZdoExfj_nAPHGSSX5w1HEwW_nHy1QHNQr6KNLRcdJXtDpUsGJ_Y50sMr5mzI3qEuaAuqXptupvCZDy5N07k-ONJOr9jr6ZViW4P-CvtyvJNek_wVelYag8NVWohCvJxx9ej5pC3fs9KZVqei7Enx0bNDOJkoFW3b_7uuRI6qTYHLa8tOrq8zibX_ss2lg9XXjM0ku-D4VefNe1oT5U%3D) Everyone,
Election Day is quickly approaching, and it seems that my opponent is doing all he can to hide from Mississippi voters. In case you haven’t heard, Jim Hood has refused several offers to debate me, despite insisting that he would “ _anytime, anywhere_." If this isn’t a sign that Hood should not hold public office, I don’t know what is. Hood has proven that he will do whatever it takes to avoid answering for his radical liberal ideas; Mississippi cannot afford to have someone like Hood in charge of our state. In short, we have no choice but to win this race in November, and to do that I need your help. [ FIGHT BACK - DONATE TODAY ](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=17f4f6b861064a0f92f9f41c15a4f3ae&_e=Goxw9KIVU4pZiiBRJSttl2Aaq2VmDIzoh1tIBKMWW8UuogptGuE36daOT4-okFpjfTHyftYXNyUfREBOWiMgKIWaTX6us-jvkcKENyRoL7uh41_ApS_RxbPEJaArbDgxZ7ijU-8YcYFIFrOwkyD7jKnLDJA4-G9qFg_c6va-dksVqaSRlZYu8CTuDMQWoTSN9B_0zxGXQqpu75kl2Q5P-ROp2PhbfBr3w0H_Qj8LgqoOgxIOs3XK_3oRuyOaQ8sOTeR8Hh4d1eIxKAFgRrJuNrs9BuhPZcLfweut684vBY3WAJrbLAye1jkwqADBYjyOrZJnlwgtFPlMg2CmBpNr8s5CfVojkbqLuftMtG7Logk4WZtnBZ8sZH5nHPyEUedrN8JKXkgE13yf-lYHZewudg%3D%3D) With the end of the month approaching, my team has set an ambitious fundraising goal of $6,500 in donations before we close the books for September. **Every donation is another voice telling Jim Hood and his liberal allies that Mississippi knows better, Mississippi deserves better, and that we’re going to fight his policies all the way to the ballot box.**

We cannot afford to slow down this campaign, and your donation is the only thing that will allow us to keep our momentum. [Make a difference by donating whatever you can to Team Tate before the end of the month](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=17f4f6b861064a0f92f9f41c15a4f3ae&_e=Goxw9KIVU4pZiiBRJSttl2Aaq2VmDIzoh1tIBKMWW8UuogptGuE36daOT4-okFpjfTHyftYXNyUfREBOWiMgKIWaTX6us-jvkcKENyRoL7uh41_ApS_RxbPEJaArbDgxZ7ijU-8YcYFIFrOwkyD7jKnLDJA4-G9qFg_c6va-dksVqaSRlZYu8CTuDMQWoTSNgcdtujBazugcxAqNY2GuCTaJcadhq-mwYQV3VPNNRJbIW9okP_A7ermBLfqvJd4bfP_VpRdlxWZGm68N1BD4VigehqM6yhpqaP-McxW_3xt_plyTcSBgckCnA92mwcSUks41TCGkhM_a9451RwbOkAQ7kPYPTPHdu_67TL8Z1JlJzvrr0FeXd-B81xqLc-Wh9YEXsXxz4_tPEj611o4BMA%3D%3D). clean_body: We have no choice but to win this race in November Everyone, Election Day is quickly approaching, and it seems that my opponent is doing all he can to hide from Mississippi voters. In case you haven’t heard, Jim Hood has refused several offers to debate me, despite insisting that he would “ anytime, anywhere." If this isn’t a sign that Hood should not hold public office, I don’t know what is. Hood has proven that he will do whatever it takes to avoid answering for his radical liberal ideas; Mississippi cannot afford to have someone like Hood in charge of our state. In short, we have no choice but to win this race in November, and to do that I need your help. With the end of the month approaching, my team has set an ambitious fundraising goal of $6,500 in donations before we close the books for September. Every donation is another voice telling Jim Hood and his liberal allies that Mississippi knows better, Mississippi deserves better, and that we’re going to fight his policies all the way to the ballot box. We cannot afford to slow down this campaign, and your donation is the only thing that will allow us to keep our momentum. . Thank you for your support Sincerely, Tate Reeves Paid for by Tate for Governor | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

subject: FW: more important than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
I hope you saw this note from my campaign manager, Kevin, and took a moment to read it. The end of quarter FEC public fundraising deadline is a big deal - and now it's only 3 days away! Check out the full note below and please consider making a contribution to our campaign. |
Friends,

I hope you saw this note from my campaign manager, Kevin, and took a moment to read it.

The end-of-quarter FEC public fundraising deadline is a big deal -- and now it's only 3 days away! Check out the full note below and please consider making a contribution to our campaign.

Here's the big idea: Our first quarter is coming to an end, and soon, we'll report our fundraising numbers to the public. The pundits, Vern Buchanan, and people who really care about us winning are going to see if we are bringing in the money necessary to run a serious, well-funded campaign.

[**So, it 's more important than ever that we hit our goal! We're getting closer by the day to our end-of-quarter deadline, and as of this morning, we have $17,348 left to raise. Can you please help out with a donation of any size? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

| ********[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

Thank you for working hard for Southwest Florida, friends!

_Margaret_

\-----forwarded message-----
From:**Kevin Lata (Margaret Good for Congress)**
Date: Tue, Sep 24, at 12:11 PM
Subject: Our biggest date so far

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
Hi friends,

We're 6 days away from the biggest milestone of our campaign so far: **Our first FEC filing deadline.**

Here's what you need to know: On September 30 at 11:59 PM, we'll close the books on our first quarter in the race, and campaigns across the country will submit their fundraising numbers from the last three months to the Federal Election Commission.

**Those numbers are then released in a highly anticipated public report.**

[**Friends, you can click here to chip in toward our $22,000 end-of-quarter goal and make sure you 're part of our campaign before we publicly report our numbers. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

| ********[Chip in now »](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

The deadline that's rapidly approaching in 6 days will determine much of the road ahead for our race. If you have a moment, I'd like to quickly explain why:
1. **This public fundraising report is our first opportunity to prove our strength.** Everyone from potential supporters to pundits will be pouring over our numbers -- both how much we've raised and how many supporters we have -- to determine our viability in the race. It's critical we show we have a powerful grassroots network ready to fight for change.

2. **Special interests and the GOP establishment want to know if we 're a threat to Vern Buchanan.** Spoiler alert: We are -- a big one. A large fundraising total will showcase the broad coalition of supporters that stand behind Margaret and our campaign.

3. **Our first end-of-quarter goal will be the foundation of our campaign budget.** I know this network is capable of building an unstoppable campaign, but between registering voters, hiring a strong staff, and filming digital ads, our race will be expensive. We need to aim high and invest early if we're going to win!

**If you believe in the message we 're spreading across Southwest Florida -- that our representative should work tirelessly and fight for change that will benefit hardworking families -- I want you to be a part of this huge campaign milestone.**

[**Friends, we have 6 days to raise $22,000 and show our opponent, DC special interests, and anyone else watching that we 're in this race to win. Help us finish our first quarter in the race strong with a donation before our FEC public deadline. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

[Donate $10 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | [Donate $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoKMHngTBm76z8WzfXrecFwizpoCyqKYdVezOfV87cw=/_A3dW8Ti3MbpNvJwcEqnhokWntTPslMfDEpBeUR6BGA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.27_b1_mk2_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

name: thanking teachers
subject: a nice boost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
As a teacher, assistant principal and basketball coach, I know how much of a boost it can be for educators to get a "thank you."
|
---

| | Peter,

As a teacher, assistant principal and basketball coach, I know how much of a boost it can be for educators to get a "thank you." Especially when Matt Bevin is out there constantly attacking and bullying us.

It meant a lot to see all the people who signed our card thanking teachers for their work and I recently dropped one off at a school so they could see it in person. | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a47/ad6dc73/14135f02/db78325/3533328935/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/beshear-teacherty")

It's been demoralizing to be constantly demeaned by our own governor. But it's just making us fight back even harder.

Thanks,
Jacqueline

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Adam Schiff and Democrats are Twisting Words to Smear Trump
body:
"We were promised a Hollywood-style, smoking gun quid pro quo. But after the transcript was released, the whistleblower complaint came out, and.." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffae15c35a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Adam Schiff and Democrats are Twisting Words to Smear Trump**

“We were promised a Hollywood-style, smoking gun quid pro quo. But after the transcript was released, the whistleblower complaint came out, and the House Intelligence Committee grilled acting Director of National Intelligence Joseph Maguire, leaving most people with glazed-over expressions, wondering what the big deal is,” Jenna Ellis Rives writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

Yesterday, “Chairman Adam Schiff attempted to play word games with Maguire in an effort to manipulate the situation and paint the intelligence community and the White House as covering up something really, really bad that President Trump must have done.”

“So why the manipulation? Because the Democrats know their case is weak. Their only hope lies in trying to twist legal terminology for their political advantage.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e53d4c9e98&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The formal complaint from an anti-Trump ‘whistleblower’ alleging various crimes by President Donald Trump is riddled with third-hand gossip and outright falsehoods,” Sean Davis writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7f8eee83f&e=3ee4985eea). “Rather than provide direct evidence that was witnessed or obtained firsthand by the complainant, the document instead combines gossip from various anonymous individuals, public media reports, and blatant misstatements of fact and law in service of a narrative that is directly contradicted by underlying facts. A footnote in the document even boasts about its use of ‘ample open-source information.’”
---
|
---
| “House Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff (D-CA) performed an entirely made-up conversation between President Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky during his opening statement at a committee hearing Thursday morning,” Kristina Wong reports for [_Breitbart News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7874dd7949&e=3ee4985eea). “The White House released a transcript of a phone call between Trump and Zelensky on Wednesday, but Schiff made up and fabricated his own transcript that he read at the hearing, which sought to create the quid pro quo that Democrats have accused the president of making.”
---
|
---
| Rather than getting entangled in an impeachment battle, Congress should move to approve a new trade pact with Mexico and Canada, the USMCA, [_The Detroit News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a15803da4&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “The window appears to be narrowing for getting anything productive done in Washington, but this is one piece of business that is essential to maintaining America's decade-long prosperity streak. It should get top priority.”
---
|
---
| “Palestinians are among the largest recipients of donor assistance per capita in the world today. Yet despite decades of work, billions of dollars, euros, shekels, and dinars donated, life continues to get worse,” U.S. Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=40a86eca3d&e=3ee4985eea). “Hamas has driven Gaza to a state of utter desperation. With unemployment at nearly 50 percent (the highest in the world), Hamas’ decade-long experiment in governance is an utter failure.” Greenblatt adds that “donor countries must ask themselves why they should keep struggling to raise money when everyone can plainly see the Hamas regime and the Palestinian Authority are squandering the opportunities that donor money provides for a better future for all Palestinians.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d705835eaf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c778b167f5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e8a1a16f9f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: SENATE ALERT (Team Ben Ray)
subject: Fox News just admitted:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked.
Ben Ray Lujan asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
James Carville asked.
Paul Begala asked.

That's how absolutely unprecedented this is.

\- Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are in danger of losing their Senate
\- So Trump threw a MASSIVE rally in New Mexico to save their chances
**\- It's never been more urgent for us to hit Ben Ray's end-of-quarter goal**

One thing has never been more certain:

If we let Trump take New Mexico from Democrats, we will lose our once-in-a-lifetime chance to finally oust McConnell and his entire Republican Senate.

It's downright critical that we get 1,876 gifts in the door before Ben Ray's end-of-quarter deadline in 72 hours. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: All in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I think a lot about what made us so successful in 2018, especially as we
try to find our way in this presidential race. Here’s what I know: If we
can replicate what we did in Texas all over this country — the energy,
volunteering, the grassroots fundraising — we will not only defeat Donald
Trump in 2020, but we will win the Senate and House and umpteen important
state and local races.

I’ve seen up close what an energized grassroots campaign can accomplish.
We didn’t break the record for most votes for a Democrat in Texas because
I was an amazing politician. We didn’t raise more than any Senate campaign
in history (most of it online) because I said NFL players who kneel are
patriotic Americans. We didn’t knock millions of doors because we had the
biggest staff.

We broke those records because people in Texas and all over the country
understood — some of them for the first time in their lives — that when
millions of people come together we are extremely powerful.

We can run that kind of campaign against Trump in 2020. We can set our
sights high. Break records for online fundraising. Break records for door
knocking. Raise turnout as high as ever. Win so-called “red states” like
Texas.

It all starts when we get a group of people together who are going to be
fired up and say, “I’m all in.” Today, I’m asking you to do that.

In three days we will close our public fundraising report for the FEC
deadline. We need to raise $750k to show we have serious momentum.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35471?refcode=ema20190927-57758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=57758%2E444211%2E-edHrZ ]Please — if you’re fired up about building a grassroots movement to
beat Trump and shake our politics up — will you make a $3
donation?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35471?refcode=ema20190927-57758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=57758%2E444211%2E-edHrZ ]Contribute $3

Your donation today could be the one that tips us over the line on hitting
our goal. And look, if only a few people give on an email like this one,
it’s not going to amount to much. But when hundreds, or thousands, or tens
of thousands and eventually millions of people come together... that’s a
whole 'nother story.

That’s when we break records. That’s when we don’t just eke out a win
against Trump, but we flip Texas’ 38 electoral college votes, flip the
Senate, keep the House and roll into Washington DC with a mandate for
change in 2021.

It’s all possible. We just need everyone to be all in. And it starts with
us hitting our goal: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35471?refcode=ema20190927-57758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=57758%2E444211%2E-edHrZ ]Please make a $3 donation right
now towards our $750k goal before Monday’s midnight FEC deadline.

What we do right now will determine whether or not we’ll have a grassroots
movement strong enough to accomplish all of this. I’m ready to fight for
it, but I can’t do it without you.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35471?refcode=ema20190927-57758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=57758%2E444211%2E-edHrZ ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190927footer&t=1023&refcode2=57758_444211_-edHrZ&akid=57758%2E444211%2E-edHrZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=57758%2E444211%2E-edHrZ

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump wants to nuke hurricanes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Our commander-in-chief, the person responsible for taking us to war and defending the country, has decided that he wants to use nuclear weapons against hurricanes to disrupt them and stop them from making landfall. You read that right. Trump wants to drop nukes on hurricanes. NOAA, the government's weather service, has said this is a horrific idea for a range of reasons, including that it won't do anything to stop the storms and will just spread toxic radiation. This hypocritical and delusional approach to science is Trump's m.o. \-- to nuke nature and ignore the experts, just like how he ignores the science on climate change and wants to destroy the environment. While world leaders were meeting at the G-7 summit to deal with the climate crisis, Trump was nowhere to be found except on Twitter. This madman in the White House has got to go \-- he places everyone on the planet in danger with his quixotic nature and rash, poorly thought-out decisions. He doesn't listen to his advisors, he cozies up to dictators, and he wants to trash the Earth. We need to hear from Democrats across the country where they stand. Please let us know: **Should we impeach Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd23/6e9863e8/150c07dd/1db0d155/438631512/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dZWgWDN24") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd23/6e9863e8/150c07dd/1db0d155/438631512/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dZWgWDN24") Thank you for answering our question, -WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd23/6e9863e8/150c07dd/1db0d155/438631512/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dZWgWDN24")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd23/6e9863e8/150c07dd/1db0d15b/438631512/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

| Hi Peter,

Our campaign is just days away from our first major test, so I thought I’d reach out to you in advance.

This Monday will mark our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) end-of-quarter deadline, and all of our work from launch until now will be revealed for public consumption when our fundraising report is released.

name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: BREAKING: Trump in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
My friend, I would think that President Trump has more pressing matters on his plate than his campaign right now, but he just announced he'll be coming to Minnesota on October 10th for a rally. This will be the second time he's traveled to Minnesota this year and his goal is simple: To flip us red for the first time in 48 years and drag the entire DFL ticket down when he does. **[BREAKING: Trump to campaign in Minnesota in October](https://act.myngp.com/el/R81QdE2n0u2y-hgnbJnLAWeN7E0zcyzoXtoIyNZ1Sk0=/C-BBIC5bTEoH-OPE20yaHlN3n5uaS9CqPlUgw2O5Avw=?refcode=body&amount=25)** My friend, I would think that President Trump has more pressing matters on his plate than his campaign right now, but he just announced he'll be coming to Minnesota on October 10th for a rally. This will be the second time he's traveled to Minnesota this year and his goal is simple: To flip us red for the first time in 48 years and drag the entire DFL ticket down when he does. **He 's made clear that he thinks he can do it by spreading fear and division. I guess he forgot that in 2018, our state rejected the politics of division and instead voted in record numbers for our One Minnesota agenda that recognizes our strength in unity.** Help us send him a clear message that we're ready to reject him up and down the ballot again in 2020. If we are going to stay on track to build the resources we need to accomplish this, we absolutely need to hit our $30,000 end-of-quarter grassroots goal before our deadline on September 30th. **We 're just about halfway there, and we need your help to make it up. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: She was 24 and pregnant when her husband was killed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/15873403/3298814085/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | You know what makes America special? It's coming together to give everyone a chance, even when times are tough or disaster strikes. Take Iowa's Theresa Greenfield. **Her story is as inspiring as it is excruciating. Theresa was 24 years old, with a baby on her hip and another on the way, when her husband was killed in a tragic workplace accident.** One thing that saved Theresa? _Social Security_ , one major thread in our social safety net. Without Social Security survivor benefits, who knows what would have happened to Theresa and her young family. Instead of going into poverty, she was able to go to school, build a career, and provide for her family. **Now, Theresa Greenfield is running for the U.S. Senate in Iowa**. And she's running because Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are dead set on gutting Social Security. [**Chip in right now. Let's support Theresa's run to win in Iowa and help us take back the Senate in 2020.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/15873400/3298814085/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-greenfield?refcode=2019-09-27-greenfield&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100#") **2020 can't be only about defeating Donald Trump. Our country's future depends on also taking back the Senate. And the road to a Senate majority goes through Iowa.** It's critical to support extraordinary candidates like Theresa, candidates who have lived the troubles faced by many Americans, troubles that Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are ignoring (and too often, making worse.) [**Stand with me and let's defend Social Security, and let's take back the Senate in 2020 with Iowa's Theresa Greenfield. Donate today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/15873400/3298814085/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-greenfield?refcode=2019-09-27-greenfield&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100#") **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley and Theresa Greenfield instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/15873401/3298814085/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-greenfield?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-27-greenfield&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/1587343e/3298814085/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-greenfield?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-27-greenfield&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/1587343f/3298814085/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-greenfield?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-27-greenfield&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d338/6cd27893/519a2abd/1587343c/3298814085/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-greenfield?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-27-greenfield&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Durbin HQ
subject: re: President Trump's attacks on Senator Durbin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
President Trump's false attacks on Senator Durbin are completely out of line. We need to fight back, Peter.
[**Add your name to stand with Dick Durbin and tell President Trump to drop his false and inappropriate attacks.**](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c09/42ab3cf4/61f1cf4c/135d4514/4292357662/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190927&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")
**[ADD MY NAME](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c09/42ab3cf4/61f1cf4c/135d4514/4292357662/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190927&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
\---Original Message from Senator Dick Durbin---
Peter,
Yesterday, President Trump held a press conference at the UN...and called out Senators Bob Menendez, Patrick Leahy, and myself in an attempt to distract from his actions regarding Ukraine.
**[I need you to show you're standing with me. Add your name now to tell President Trump to drop his false and inappropriate attacks. ](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c09/42ab3cf4/61f1cf4c/135d4514/4292357662/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190927&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Here is the truth: Back in 2018, there were reports that Ukraine was considering refusing to cooperate with the Mueller investigation -- an official investigation conducted by the United States -- out of concern that President Trump would cut off aid as punishment. So in May 2018, Senators Menendez, Leahy, and I sent a _public_ letter expressing our concerns on this matter to Ukraine's Prosecutor General.
As it turns out, we were even more right than we knew to worry that President Trump would try to use aid to Ukraine as leverage for his political agenda.
**[We cannot allow President Trump to deflect and distract from his abuse of power. Add your name now to tell President Trump to drop his false and inappropriate attacks.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c09/42ab3cf4/61f1cf4c/135d4514/4292357662/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190927&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Thank you for standing with me.
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c09/42ab3cf4/61f1cf4c/135d4514/4292357662/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190927&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: ICYMI: "100 Percent" Video Released
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Yesterday, our campaign released a new video, 100 Percent highlighting Lizzie Fletcher's full support of Nancy Pelosi and the effort to impeach the Pr
Friend,
Yesterday, our campaign released a new video, _100 Percent_ highlighting Lizzie Fletcher's full support of Nancy Pelosi and the effort to impeach the President.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=be6111eb5ea148baadd072704bfc75c6&_e=ecJyL3bS4vt6ZqvlPgbsbCSOLH240m4Or9i37F7yPl9JK7jIwK4m1XoJIHPhOs5U4y0HZVLZ-VCpPt4ruki1bhmdpJRJFKAkoCXIFlbF9xYnjeSj6n8QXV6B9yg7gZQe8x3BKNaI1KccySLzdgJEph2KFZ0n9YthCBZYJTQwer7tu21zuaJ6678ci-JCWAYzTebrw0NzmFJGQHQfobWy1DDfvXmHev7YzAbHWSxNhyjJGIzIWLB2VqUBjqMD3tBcC4zJ-u-LcUW349gSuCoopPsIOfLfThLxhj1Bscs8Bgk%3D)

Lizzie Fletcher campaigned as a moderate. She claimed she wouldn't take orders from Pelosi. And yet, she has supported Pelosi across the board. First she voted for her for Speaker, then she fully supported Pelosi's legislative agenda, and now she's trying to impeach President Trump.

We need leadership who will put the 7th District first. We need Wesley Hunt, not Lizzie Fletcher.

Join our team today by [clicking here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=be6111eb5ea148baadd072704bfc75c6&_e=ecJyL3bS4vt6ZqvlPgbsbCnmooX55ua_MDcuGXYCwaQkju5VRGawVrr6eWrABIVwW19sCYNzbURfUeTVLJEohMWxWfZnIFKaaVY9lww_Sc2Jsot3a8hlXWBmGsnS6SWELECyJbun-yVUZrChdtGzhhcx4FOoyxg8WuMLaHdST_nwzm1QsC1nP2TGR_Mc-aTmjPVWA582yi2xnqzR4LSpfxNSRSB4iXFHYuNLcdxWgvPwz9sd_n6Y1HAeav4VcJDQ-Q2P6kcgY2WIAxKZlQ-2TbuTdtci1NKXuA1dIBS3UT-Kh2c-y9XUvJVDcyAXeIX8wmLqtrOxijSUQKBIO2xRJP5q-Nq8-Vdg46rJqLJLOOsXI4E09oue0zKZKLBsz6NkYkgb9cwlvmkmH6ID2_cg-U--zfSlKyCE8wcRAVruhrQ%3D)!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

We've got just a few days left before our important FEC fundraising deadline, and here's the thing: our numbers are a bit behind where they need to be.

It's powerfully important that we hit our end-of-quarter goal. These milestones are how we set budgets for opening new offices, hiring more organizers, hosting town halls, and more.

**[Specifically, we've got an important target: 25,000 new donors before the deadline. That's what we'll need to hit our end-of-quarter goal. We're proud of where this movement is right now, and we need real resources to keep growing -- to make all of the investments needed to win this race and build a lasting movement for big, structural change.

name: Team Franken
subject: We wouldn't ask if it weren't absolutely critical -- can you help us reach our end-of-quarter goal for Mike?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We still need your help if we're going to hit our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline in four days. Can we count on your gift today?
|
---

| | Friends, we wanted to give you a quick update on Mike's campaign. The good news: After our initial call for donations earlier this week, many of you gave whatever you could. The concerning news: We still need your help if we're going to hit our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline in four days. [**Will you donate $3 or more today to help us beat this quarterly fundraising goal before the September 30 FEC deadline?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2467/33365068/4a66e3cc/3f8bb0b6/4178589839/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190927_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $3 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2467/33365068/4a66e3cc/3f8bb0b7/4178589839/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=20190927_em_express_lane_3")
---
[Donate $10 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2467/33365068/4a66e3cc/3f8bb0b0/4178589839/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190927_em_express_lane_10")
---
[Donate $25 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2467/33365068/4a66e3cc/3f8bb0b1/4178589839/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190927_em_express_lane_25")
---
[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2467/33365068/4a66e3cc/3f8bb0b2/4178589839/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190927_em_express_lane_other")
---
Friends, there are people who wanted us to wait to run this campaign -- to sit this one out and try again later.
But Mike doesn't bow to political pressure. He was trained to do what's right -- right now.
We can't wait to lower prescription drug costs. We must urgently take on Wall Street's greed. We have to say to the thousands and thousands of Iowans who marched in our streets last week: Yes, climate change is a crisis for our families and our farms. And yes, we're going to do something about it.
Those aren't just Mike's values or Democratic values. They're Iowa values.
[**Donate to Mike's campaign, right now, to bring those progressive Iowa values to D.C. We urgently need to reach our $50,000 goal and show the political world that this campaign is strong and ready to win.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2467/33365068/4a66e3cc/3f8bb0b6/4178589839/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190927_em")

Thanks in advance,
Team Franken

|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---
Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Sioux City, IA 51102

"" Thanks in advance, Team Franken | | | Paid for by Franken for Iowa Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Franken for Iowa PO Box 3171 Sioux City, IA 51102

name: Tim Kaine
subject: We need Ed Markey's voice -- and vote -- in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

I'm writing to ask you to contribute to Ed Markey's campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate from Massachusetts. Throughout my career in politics, I'm lucky to have worked with some of the smartest leaders in politics. Believe me when I tell you, Ed Markey is one of them. Ed's been a major leader on issues ranging from protecting net neutrality to taking action on gun control. He's brought the fight to opioid manufacturers and Big Pharma. And he's fought tooth-and-nail to get Congress to address the climate crisis. [**Derek, Ed 's voice in the Senate is critical. And with 2020 fast approaching, we cannot afford to leave any seats up to chance. So I'm asking you directly: Can you contribute to my friend Ed Markey's campaign for re-election?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb2/3704533929/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMELook+Edrsquos+voice+in+the+Sena&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb1/3704533929/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM")
---
| [**DONATE $20**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb0/3704533929/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+20&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb7/3704533929/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb6/3704533929/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM")
---
Without Ed Markey's voice, it will be that much harder to defend Obamacare, protect reproductive rights, and fight against a reactionary, right-wing Supreme Court.
[**I hope you 'll chip in whatever you can today to help make sure Ed is re-elected next November.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb5/3704533929/VEsA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+I+hope+yoursquoll+chip+in+whatever+you+c&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM")
******[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1714/3e0906/78fe290e/3e30ffb4/3704533929/VEsB/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em?refcode=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM&source=20190927_4_FR_TK_EM")******

Thank you for all you're doing,
-Tim Kaine
