name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Democrats' one goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Since day one, Democrats in Washington have been focused solely on one thing – taking down President Donald Trump. Before he even had a chance to.....

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/democrats-one-goal?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/presidentialharassment?mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Democrats’ One Goal

Since day one, Democrats in Washington have been focused solely on one thing (https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1176610391058722816?mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) – taking down President Donald Trump. Before he even had a chance to be sworn into office, these Democrats resolved to stand against anything he wanted to deliver for Americans – tax reform, border security, fair trade and so much more.

And this week, they’ve taken their work to a new extreme, as Nancy Pelosi announced plans on Tuesday to launch an impeachment inquiry against President Trump.

I was in Washington, D.C. for a few days this week, and unfortunately I saw some of this nonsense up-close. President Trump was absolutely correct when he called this “presidential harassment.” After it was revealed once-and-for-all that there was no Trump-Russia collusion in 2016, congressional Democrats have moved onto the next delusion.

I met with many of your Republican representatives while I was in DC, and they’ve simply had enough of the Democrats’ games and antics. And I’ve had enough, too.

On the flight back home, I reflected on how thankful I am that we live in Indiana, a state that couldn’t be further from this foolishness. Here in Indiana, we balance our budgets, pay our bills, work together, and provide great government service. It’s all about results, and delivering for Hoosiers.

If this week taught us anything, it’s that we could certainly use a lot more Indiana in our nation’s capital.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Taking Indiana to the World: China Edition

Governor Holcomb is continuing to take Indiana to the world and bring the world to Indiana! This week he began his first economic development trip to China, where he met with U.S. and Chinese government officials, university partners, business executives and Indiana business prospects in Beijing.
* Governor Holcomb visited the headquarters of Shougang Group and met with executive leaders. A subsidiary of Shougang Group, Beijing West Industires (BWI) announced plans to locate its first U.S. production facility in Greenfield, creating up to 441 new, high-wage jobs by the end of 2021!
* Governor Holcomb welcomed nearly 100 guests to the U.S. Ambassador’s Residence for a Friends of Indiana reception. This reception will help create opportunities to forge new partnerships between Indiana and China!
* Governor Holcomb helped host a business roundtable event that connected executives of Indiana-based companies operating in China, including Allison Transmission and Cook Group. Governor Holcomb highlighted the state’s commitment to increasing global connectivity and international partnerships!
* In Beijing, Governor Holcomb met with Li Xiaolin, president of China People’s Association for Friendship with Foreign Countries, a nonpartisan organization focused on deepening international friendships and overseas sister-city and sister-state partnerships!

On his overseas trade missions, Governor Holcomb is continuing to create opportunities for Hoosiers and show the world all that Indiana has to offer!
President Trump’s Indiana Team in Place!

HUGE news! Just yesterday, President Trump officially announced his honorary state chairs in Indiana, and it’s a lot of names you’ll recognize! His Indiana honorary chairs are:
* Governor Eric Holcomb
* Senator Todd Young
* Senator Mike Braun
* Congresswoman Jackie Walorski
* Congressman Jim Banks
* Congressman Jim Baird
* Congressman Greg Pence
* Congressman Larry Bucshon
* Congressman Trey Hollingsworth

“Our Indiana Trump team will help to replicate and expand the President’s near 20-point victory in Indiana in 2016, delivering a 2020 win for both the President and GOP candidates up and down the ballot,” said Brad Parscale, campaign manager for President Donald J. Trump for President Inc., and Ronna McDaniel, chairwoman of the RNC.
Welcome Back Home, Vice President Pence!

Vice President Mike Pence is back home again this week! Yesterday, Air Force Two touched down in Indianapolis prior to an event highlighting why it is critical for Congress to pass the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) – the largest and most comprehensive trade deal in American history. This agreement will expand markets for Hoosier-built and Hoosier-grown goods.

Today, Vice President Pence is touring the Neurodiagnostic Institute and Advanced Treatment Center at Community Hospital East before participating in a roundtable discussion with public health leaders.
Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military

This year's Team Holcomb Fall Dinner (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8e1cc78df3&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) is coming up quickly on October 14 (just over two weeks!), and it’s an event you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw as the event's special guests at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird, and you may remember Congressman Crenshaw from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's tweet (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4b3354c99&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral.

Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=332ff69d64&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) now!

--> Reserve your seat here <-- (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4d5ff81e5c&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Get Active: Super Saturdays 2019

Countdown – six Saturdays until 2019 Election Day, and we need your help to make sure our Republican mayoral, city council and other municipal candidates win. Sign-up now to volunteer for an upcoming Super Saturday! (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=734c9ee8b0&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=112b446be4&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

As part of our upcoming Super Saturdays, we have six opportunities throughout Indiana over the next six weekends for you to volunteer on several down-to-the-wire races where your work could help set our candidates over the top -- making sure that they cross the finish line first.

We need YOU to make all of this possible! This is your chance to be a Republican superhero for our mayoral candidates.

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Mitch McConnell is headlining a fundraiser for Susan Collins!
body:
They're going to raise SO much money.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5b/4bef7a87/6b6e65e1/287f3a44/811215798/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Big news, friends!
Mitch McConnell will be the special guest at a private, high-dollar fundraiser for Susan Collins. He clearly wasn't lying when he said this:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5b/4bef7a87/6b6e65e1/287f3a5b/811215798/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjctMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190927-2-full")
**We know this event will bring in a TON of money for Senator Collins. We have to work fast if we want to close the gap:**
[**Rush a $3 contribution before our FEC deadline on Monday at midnight. We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation before Monday will make a really big impact.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5b/4bef7a87/6b6e65e1/287f3a5b/811215798/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjctMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190927-2-full")
Thanks in advance for chipping in. Susan Collins may have Mitch McConnell backing her - but we have you, and that's going to make all the difference.
Best,
_Team Sara_
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c5b/4bef7a87/6b6e65e1/287f3a5b/811215798/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjctMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190927-2-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Devin Nunes
subject: If we lose the Senate Majority...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
If we lose our Republican majority, Democrats will block every single one of President Trump's judicial nominees and will certainly move to impeach.Friend, if we lose our Republican majority in the Senate, Democrats will block every single one of President Trump's judicial nominees and will certainly move to impeach him. | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=83b1b9c33a6f44af917e217828063610&_e=yfanvBQqwOwC540KswUWm9vHSK6tQwcRFIc0fkR_w_wLke_z6RH8AslkQMkeSAM183eISKU8paQzzodYL-wuOqzlp5D5DpSFF7JBcIDa4j5c4QnrdWlQHYFNKq1PF21cMM9a-vUIvi8VoVHWm06gvzyBe1Xb4P0ou28p6n2Td60UBiKbicRaODC4WAoSF-xVuH0Ina-KKiYRQ3erbi1S_eSSfGBUSBpw05KOjqsLilvSHZfa-VE7Wso1XUWKF4Jy5Ou8v5eEfDQtRKXwCTnj00qgDXYxwJlLg9ZF8rbWt7UAB2RxsuKrL2isV-CQhOgyVu1qlVJ87IKx-tzwkRUMrgzYBisFtdzHf9AuZk2AFaFJghS-EKSPtcxT-cl9gpuB)
---
Friend,

I wish you could understand how horrifying it has been to watch the Democrats control the policy agenda in the House.

Instead of promoting policies that would benefit the American people, the Democrats have colluded with the deep state and the fake news media to orchestrate a takedown of our president.

On top of this, the Left continues to support radical socialist policies that will drive our nation to bankruptcy. We can't afford to let the Democrats take control of the Senate.

That's why I'm asking for your immediate help, Friend. We need patriots like you **[to pitch in to support Senator Steve Daines](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=83b1b9c33a6f44af917e217828063610&_e=yfanvBQqwOwC540KswUWm9vHSK6tQwcRFIc0fkR_w_wLke_z6RH8AslkQMkeSAM183eISKU8paQzzodYL-wuOqzlp5D5DpSFF7JBcIDa4j5c4QnrdWlQHYFNKq1PF21cMM9a-vUIvi8VoVHWm06gvzyBe1Xb4P0ou28p6n2Td63zmszHMNelEMLprti3D1KQzUJkP80z1jw3HqRXAdRbtQpcyioVfv1n0FudOASqAPNeafjqib0DxiWDtMRm71ZvP45xwQ3Ob_idFjvllL5ui-J8T2k-Z4d_9mkHFvs_zV9qDd-X9bwn6iXFc1YpbMT39s3gG7TzQsCqZNJ6L6-xCb1kum0CPzlL7D3Wd20j3cZmKoBZQyKdTct249UHHrd1)** , who has become one of the Democrats' top targets in 2020.
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=83b1b9c33a6f44af917e217828063610&_e=yfanvBQqwOwC540KswUWm9vHSK6tQwcRFIc0fkR_w_wLke_z6RH8AslkQMkeSAM183eISKU8paQzzodYL-wuOqzlp5D5DpSFF7JBcIDa4j5c4QnrdWlQHYFNKq1PF21cMM9a-vUIvi8VoVHWm06gvzyBe1Xb4P0ou28p6n2Td62Ug5riKu3su5BCPn5OpxyyidULuYFfalOwJy5WHEUIGIRWhkSeogY7oYfFX1PujX9uYLz5paMG-_mJ4mFmPReJqc5B6oNDzf5C2JX50nPb4sh7OGF4j9rFoBv4-Qx6gm5Wh8jzz_IZJjF0CKrRu504_MZM6IziS7nd6YmtPy7q1czD2u3scKpetDNdAEaEu21r33KKeXDGw4TME0xquH_1)
Friend, if we lose our Republican majority in the Senate, Democrats will block every single one of President Trump's judicial nominees and will certainly move to impeach him.

And mark my words: they will quickly start to destroy the pro-growth and pro-American policies we have achieved over the last two years.

If the Democrats manage to beat Steve in what is already one of the most hotly contested races in the nation, not only will our country lose one of the strongest conservative voices in Congress, but our Republican majority in the Senate will be at stake.

**[Will you please join me in giving Steve Daines the support he needs to fend off the Democrats' assault on his seat by sending $10, $25, $50, or even $100?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=83b1b9c33a6f44af917e217828063610&_e=yfanvBQqwOwC540KswUWm9vHSK6tQwcRFIc0fkR_w_wLke_z6RH8AslkQMkeSAM183eISKU8paQzzodYL-wuOqzlp5D5DpSFF7JBcIDa4j5c4QnrdWlQHYFNKq1PF21cMM9a-vUIvi8VoVHWm06gvzyBe1Xb4P0ou28p6n2Td61mx71ZOEfXxZKeqjA014WPGnLniH3kzp4PzwB3a6rxP_BTNzQ4T3r62IjFnvHsPZeggreIsQa8IEB4DGqeb2hPiAoWogWfke7GbRUYpGHCgi0wDlK2-92N-Q5SNKyIMZspH7d6WTLMwJuDUMy-evJgaT9PGrLJr1weqxNZ68L46vJExLDm9jOrnN3asCc2b4Msl4W2e1cfwIfHrxiCw7Ul)**

Thank you for your support, Friend.

Devin Nunes

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=83b1b9c33a6f44af917e217828063610&_e=yfanvBQqwOwC540KswUWm9vHSK6tQwcRFIc0fkR_w_wLke_z6RH8AslkQMkeSAM183eISKU8paQzzodYL-wuOqzlp5D5DpSFF7JBcIDa4j5c4QnrdWlQHYFNKq1PF21cMM9a-vUIvi8VoVHWm06gvzyBe1Xb4P0ou28p6n2Td60BMZJJZvg0TKyzpjMCn1FSK-Q5skZB_HfJQxERJ2l33u5--MFjOZgRCXNtr2WB4s1NqC5PX8X52dDCu7YZS_dIUVLx7IXPBgZKGTDPHEIKEWm_VLD3WE9ZEzYTKCwHjSuV1pIWMDhi6-S9JDJFhFvwIHk4zNYGy6884h_4soCy8zHz9shfPI-mA2zR1uevbUymHs_xHLuugqCfNqEj7i6O)

On top of this, the Left continues to support radical socialist policies that will drive our nation to bankruptcy. We can't afford to let the Democrats take control of the Senate. That's why I'm asking for your immediate help, Friend. We need patriots like you , who has become one of the Democrats' top targets in 2020. Friend, if we lose our Republican majority in the Senate, Democrats will block every single one of President Trump's judicial nominees and will certainly move to impeach him. And mark my words: they will quickly start to destroy the pro-growth and pro-American policies we have achieved over the last two years. If the Democrats manage to beat Steve in what is already one of the most hotly contested races in the nation, not only will our country lose one of the strongest conservative voices in Congress, but our Republican majority in the Senate will be at stake. Thank you for your support, Friend. Devin Nunes | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: The fight of our lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cbc/2077554054/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")

| | You know as well as I do that 2020 must be the fight of our lives. Donald Trump's cruel policies have forced a reckoning in America. Inaction and complacency in the US Senate is at the heart of everything that's gone wrong. 2020 must be about taking on the broken system that fueled the rise of people like Trump. Now is not the time for waiting, sitting on the sidelines, or playing by old rules. I'm all in on my run for the US Senate, and I hope you'll join me. **[Pledge $3 per month to my campaign to get America moving forward again.](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cbd/2077554054/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-09-26-nonrecurring&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** I've spent my career fighting for the people our system locks out, lets down, and leaves behind. I want to bring a new passion and strong moral leadership to our biggest fights in the US Senate. That includes fighting for issues of economic justice, racial equality, civil rights, education, childcare, a fair justice system, a compassionate immigration policy, our climate future, and so much more. [**Be one of the founders of the next steps in our grassroots movement. Donate $3 per month so we can win in 2020 and take back our country and win a seat in the US Senate.**](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cbd/2077554054/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-09-26-nonrecurring&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") _Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cbe/2077554054/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-26-nonrecurring&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cbf/2077554054/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-26-nonrecurring&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cb8/2077554054/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-26-nonrecurring&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363910a5/55b66746/2c5f93ab/80c9cb9/2077554054/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-26-nonrecurring&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Sam, Beshear/Coleman
subject: Making sure you didn't miss this huge news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
The Washington Post recently ranked our campaign as the most likely governor's race to flip blue in the entire country in the next two years.
|
---

| | | **Huge news from the _Washington Post_ : Kentucky's governor's office is MOST LIKELY TO FLIP!

"Kentucky (Republican-held, 2019 election): **It's surprising to us, too, that a Republican governor in a Republican state is this high on the list. But Gov. Matt Bevin (R) is here for two reasons: 1) He's a broadly unpopular governor, whose brash style has his own Republican lieutenant governor suing him, a Republican state senator actively campaigning against him and fights with teachers that have reverberated. 2) Democrats have nominated a big name for the state, Attorney General Andy Beshear."
---
Peter,

_The Washington Post_ recently ranked Kentucky's governor's office as the most likely to flip blue in the entire country in the next two years.

**[We need to build on this momentum, and there couldn't be a more urgent time to pitch in. Friend, Greg will never stop fighting for Sixth District Hoosiers. Since he's been in Washington, Greg has kept the promises he made to us on the campaign trail. He’s fighting for our conservative values, standing with President Trump, helping create jobs, and making sure America is treated fairly on the world stage with the new USMCA trade agreement that protects Indiana workers. As Democrats become increasingly radicalized ahead of 2020, Greg is holding the line for our shared priorities. Major Democratic presidential candidates are pushing a socialist agenda that includes trillion-dollar plans to ‘save the environment,’ a government takeover of healthcare, and calls for mandatory gun buybacks that amount to the end of the Second Amendment in America. body:
A direct quote ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa222/18d6a294/4cfad06f/26d64447/247388507/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | One of James' opponents, Bill Hagerty, is in this race for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell -- not Tennesseans. Seriously **\-- check out this direct quote from one of his fundraising letters:** | | "Join President Trump and Mitch by making a generous donation right now."
---
[_**Let 's show them what this race is really about: Make a generous donation to _James ' _campaign and help elect a leader who's in it for the right reasons.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa222/18d6a294/4cfad06f/26d64444/247388507/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926z?refcode=jme190926z_m&recurring=true")
There's no doubt about it -- Hagerty has the wrong priorities:
* He's an **anti-choice extremist.**
* He bought himself a diplomatic post after **bundling money for Trump 's 2016 campaign.**
* In his campaign announcement video, he says **Trump-appointed Justice Brett Kavanaugh is the kind of judge he'd vote for.**
* He's ready to be**a rubber stamp for the dangerous Trump-McConnell agenda.**

If our opponent cared about Tennesseans first and foremost, he wouldn't be bragging about Trump's support, because **the fact of the matter is the president 's agenda -- from rural hospital closures to his trade war -- has made life harder for Tennesseans.**
[_**Chip in to help elect a senator who will put Tennesseans first -- not Washington insiders and special interests with all their partisan political agendas.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa222/18d6a294/4cfad06f/26d64444/247388507/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926z?refcode=jme190926z_m&recurring=true")

name: Alice Lin Tong, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: introductions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm Alice, Mark's new Deputy Campaign Manager! Over the coming months, it's going to be my job to help Mark build up the campaign organization we'll need to beat both Mark's GOP challenger as well as
|
---
| | Hi Derek,

**I'm Alice, Mark's new Deputy Campaign Manager!** Over the coming months, it's going to be my job to help Mark build up the campaign organization we'll need to beat both Mark's GOP challenger as well as the Trump campaign's ground operation here in Virginia.

That's actually what I'm writing to you about today. For the last couple of months, Team Warner has been updating you on the progress of the **Trump Victory Initiative** here in Virginia. The Trump campaign is calling this grassroots organizing effort "the foundation of President Trump's re-election effort in 2020." Their goal is simple: _mobilize Trump supporters in mass numbers to re-elect Donald Trump and beat Democrats like Mark Warner down the ballot._

**Will you pitch in before our upcoming FEC fundraising deadline to help us make sure that doesn 't happen?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1afd/3818792097/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1afc/3818792097/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1afb/3818792097/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1afa/3818792097/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1af9/3818792097/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1af8/3818792097/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** We already knew the Trump campaign set up its headquarters here in Virginia and that flipping the Commonwealth red is a top priority for Donald Trump. Unfortunately, we just learned that **the Trump campaign's investments in Virginia are actually much more significant than reported!** Over the summer, **the Trump campaign held nearly 50 training and organizing events** here in Virginia. And we just learned **they're expanding their efforts** with "Women for Trump" and additional organizing events.

Bottom line, Derek: Mark Warner is facing a massive Trump organizing operation here in Virginia that will give his GOP opponent a big advantage if we don't step up our efforts. [Will you rush a contribution to help Mark defend his Democratic Senate seat?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1ae7/3818792097/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

On Monday at midnight, we have our first FEC deadline since Mark's GOP opponent announced his candidacy. That means we have to report exactly how much money we've raised. **If we fall short of our $40,000 goal, you can bet Mark's opponent and the operatives at Trump HQ are going to take notice!

We cannot afford to start falling behind -- especially not when Mark is up against this kind of serious GOP opposition. [Please, Derek, will you step up and make a contribution to help keep Virginia blue in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1ae6/3818792097/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Alice Lin Tong
Deputy Campaign Manager | ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1ae5/3818792097/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190927nd__250__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0b5/53d9897e/52511be0/1c8e1ae4/3818792097/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Team Beto
subject: Leveling with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We want to level with you. No one doubts that Beto is capable of raising
money and exciting small-dollar donors. We’ve proven it time and time
again, and we’re still up in the top tier of presidential contenders.

But lately our fundraising has slowed down considerably. At the same time,
other candidates are reporting big surges.

We set a big goal because $750k is what we need to file a strong FEC
report. We might not make it, but we need to try our best right now to
close the gap. Emails like this one usually generate about half of all the
money we’ve raised so far, but only 1-in-100 people reading any given
email end up donating.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35537?refcode=ema20190927-57811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=57811%2E444211%2EKgJt8i ]Can Beto count on you to be one of those people to contribute today
towards our FEC deadline goal? Make a $3 donation now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35537?refcode=ema20190927-57811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=57811%2E444211%2EKgJt8i ]Contribute $3

This week and this deadline are SO critical. We can’t underline that
enough. Especially because this campaign is funded 100% by the people. If
we don’t hit our goals, there aren’t any PACs or special interest groups
lining up to write us big checks (and even if there were we wouldn’t
accept them!).

When you donate today, you’re helping us prove we can run a truly
grassroots-funded campaign and still compete at the highest level.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35537?refcode=ema20190927-57811&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=57811%2E444211%2EKgJt8i ]We need your help right now to pick up our pace so we don’t get
heavily outspent — add a $3 contribution now before our FEC
deadline.

Thanks for all your help.

- Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190927footer&t=1023&refcode2=57811_444211_KgJt8i&akid=57811%2E444211%2EKgJt8i

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=57811%2E444211%2EKgJt8i

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: RE: Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked.
James Carville asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
Paul Begala asked.
Ted Lieu asked.
Deb Haaland asked.
Now I'm asking.

That's how critical this is.

_**[I 'm asking you to rush $5 before the crucial end-of-quarter deadline in 72 hours to help my good friend Ben Ray WIN his Senate race and FLIP McConnell's Republican Senate. It's Ben Ray's biggest deadline, yet! >>](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190927_em_fr_b2_jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**_

I've personally seen the numbers, and they couldn't be clearer:

Mitch McConnell is in serious danger of losing his seat -- and his entire Republican Senate.

After giving this lawless President a blank check to attack our democracy...

After stacking our courts with far-right Trump judges...

After blocking every critical bill my Democratic colleagues and I have passed on health care, election security, and gun safety...

**We finally have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to OUST Mitch McConnell, FLIP the entire Senate, and restore America 's faith in Congress.**

But I can't stress this enough -- we cannot win the Senate without winning Ben Ray's crucial Senate race in New Mexico.

Ben Ray still needs 1,560 gifts before his biggest deadline of the year to close his budget gap.

I'm personally asking: Will you rush $5 before his deadline hits in 72 hours? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190927_em_fr_b2_jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190927_em_fr_b2_jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190927_em_fr_b2_jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190927_em_fr_b2_jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190927_em_fr_b2_jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---
Thank you,
Pramila

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b496/18e32a7f/530f2c49/7b08b2a9/1817666599/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b496/18e32a7f/530f2c49/7b08b2ae/1817666599/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b496/18e32a7f/530f2c49/7b08b2af/1817666599/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b496/18e32a7f/530f2c49/7b08b2ac/1817666599/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b496/18e32a7f/530f2c49/7b08b2ad/1817666599/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b496/18e32a7f/530f2c49/7b08b2a2/1817666599/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Tina Smith
subject: September
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
No one wants Jason Lewis' far-right views in the Senate. Not now, not ever. That's why we need to reach $48,403 before the end of September so Tina is ahead for this FEC deadline.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190927eoq2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, I don't take this campaign lightly.

And when Jason Lewis decided to run against me, the stakes of this race ratcheted up. _Politico_ reported that Trump is fixated on winning Minnesota, and he would do anything or help any candidate that could make it possible.

Like I said, I don't take this lightly. Which is why **I'm determined to outpace Lewis during this end-of-quarter deadline. We still need to raise $48,403 to hit our goal before the month is out, but I'm going to need your help to do it.**

**[If we hit our goal before September 30, we will prove to Jason Lewis and the Republicans that their threats are no match against us. I really mean this: Having your support throughout this race has given me and this campaign so much strength.

Because the real story in this race is that people want leadership that is dedicated to protecting all Minnesotans, not big corporations or the richest of the rich. That people believe in health care as a human right and in tackling the threats of climate change instead of hiding from them. That we live by our values in treating our neighbors with respect.

**Together, we can take on any threats that come our way. And we are starting today.[Before this end-of-quarter deadline, chip in $10 to prove we can take on any threats Jason Lewis and the GOP throw at us. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190927eoq2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for everything,

Tina Smith

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Greta Thunberg castigates global leaders at U.N.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, World leaders are meeting in New York this week for the U.N. Climate Change Summit, while student-led protests across the globe are calling out these same leaders for their inaction and slow response to the growing crisis. Youth activist Greta Thunberg, who was a panelist, offered harsh criticism to the global leaders gathered, saying, "you all come to us young people for hope...You have stolen my dreams and my childhood with your empty words...How dare you?" According to a recent _Washington Post_ survey, almost 60 percent of American teens are scared of climate change and its effects on the planet. They rank it as one of the most important issues facing the country, along with gun policy and healthcare. However, over half of them also said that they are motivated to do something about it, and a quarter of them have already taken concrete actions. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 121 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Will the climate crisis determine your vote in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd26/6e9863e8/150bc8b9/1db0d3de/2812008094/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/eBmthp8H") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd26/6e9863e8/150bc8b9/1db0d3de/2812008094/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/eBmthp8H") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd26/6e9863e8/150bc8b9/1db0d3dd/2812008094/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190927c.ND-b&refcode2=vzfqm6Dwoc3B0GrfJgsR")
